Name: Torch
Description: An old wooden torch that is still burning.

Name: Old Key
Description: A rusty iron key. It might open some doors.

Name: Dusty Book
Description: A book of ancient legends. Contains information about lost treasures.

Name: Golden Chalice
Description: A beautiful golden chalice adorned with precious gems. This is the legendary artifact!

Name: Ancient Scroll
Description: A fragile scroll covered in mysterious runes. It seems to contain a map.

Name: Mysterious Potion
Description: A glowing blue potion bubbling with magical energy. Effects unknown.

Name: Magic Crystal
Description: A pulsating crystal that hums with arcane power.

Name: Oil Lantern
Description: A sturdy lantern filled with oil. Provides better light than a torch.

Name: Fishing Rod
Description: A well-worn fishing rod, perfect for catching underground fish.

Name: Precious Jewel
Description: A sparkling ruby that seems to glow from within.

Name: Ancient Coin
Description: A gold coin from a forgotten civilization. Bears the image of an ancient king.

Name: Holy Relic
Description: A sacred artifact blessed by ancient priests. Radiates divine energy.
